title: Nami Reads the Battlefield
description: On pages 12–15, this part focuses on nami reads the battlefield, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Nami Reads the Battlefield. Nami fights Miss Doublefinger and learns how to use Usopp’s strange weapon under deadly pressure. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: Haha! I guess even a great cleanup bitter,

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: I can dodge this blind- folded!

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: Mr. 4 aim't your average cleanup hitter...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I suspected he wasn't a normal human...!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: Aghh! Here comes the next pitch!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Usopp! Consider yourself done for if you stop dead in your tracks!

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: Right! Gotta keep my legs moving or I'll be hit over and over again!

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: If I can just take you out...!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: The game's no fun without a batter!

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: Whew, I almost forgot I could do this.

summary: This part develops nami reads the battlefield and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
